creator: luigi@prova.iet.unipi.it
text:
If you run gs, some startup files are not found.
They are probably looked for in /usr/local/share/ghostscript/4.03 but the
directory in the package is 4.02 instead. Besides, the compiled binary
identifies itself (gs --version) as 3.53

Fix: 

probably a mismatch in version numbers ?
How-To-Repeat: 
	install the package, run gs
